chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 638 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.5152/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.5153/2023 (C/A) 22.08.2023 Mr. Manzoor Ali Chohan, Advocate for the Applicant / Petitioner >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2. This petition was disposed of in non-prosecution on 30.11.2022. However, when the restoration application was filed, it was restored on 21.02.2023 and disposed of with observation that respondent No.4 shall ensure flow of water as per share list to the petitioners and control theft of water from Nara Canal. Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed this application seeking initiation of contempt proceedings against the alleged Contemnor Preetam Das, Managing Director, SIDA for his alleged failure to check theft of water. It is clear that this petition was not disposed of on merits and disposed of with simple observations as above. Therefore, no case to initiate Contempt proceedings against the alleged Contemnor has been made-out. Accordingly, this application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
